description: A payroll audit flagged three issues with the OrangeHRM leave configuration that must be resolved before end of quarter. Create a new leave type named 'Compensatory Time Off' so it is available for future allocation. Correct the Annual Leave entitlement for all Finance department employees (David Nguyen, Amanda Davis, and Brian Taylor) to exactly 12 days for the current year. Additionally, add a Sick Leave entitlement of 10 days for the current calendar year to each of these Finance department employees.
